message:
fix(connectors): protocol hardening across airtable, anthropic, gcp, and plaid

Airtable — graceful shutdown on protocol "shutdown" message:
- Introduce `ProtocolResponse` struct carrying `body` + `should_exit`
  flag. When the host sends a `shutdown` method and the connector
  handles it successfully, the FCP loop now breaks cleanly instead of
  blocking on the next stdin read. This prevents zombie connector
  processes after host-initiated teardown.

Anthropic — configurable API version header:
- Replace hardcoded `API_VERSION` constant with a `resolve_api_version`
  function that checks (in order): explicit config override, the
  `FCP_ANTHROPIC_API_VERSION` environment variable, and compiled default
  (2023-06-01). Store the resolved version on `AnthropicClient` and
  thread it through all three request paths (messages, streaming,
  batch). Add `new_with_auth_and_version` constructor and
  `api_version()` accessor.

GCP — fallible auth on every request path:
- `authenticate_request` now returns `Result` instead of infallibly
  attaching headers. Every call site (list_compute_instances,
  list_storage_objects, upload_storage_object, list_cloud_run_services,
  generic get/post/post_empty) converts auth failure into
  `AttemptOutcome::Terminal` to abort the retry loop immediately rather
  than sending an unauthenticated request and interpreting the 401 as a
  retryable error.
- Reject service-account credentials at construction time with a clear
  error message (service accounts require a token exchange flow the
  connector does not implement).

Plaid — mandatory explicit base URL, no sandbox default:
- Remove `SANDBOX_BASE_URL` constant and `with_base_url` builder.
  `PlaidClient::new` now takes `base_url` as a required third argument,
  validated by `normalize_base_url` (scheme must be http/https, host
  must be present, trailing slashes stripped). This eliminates the risk
  of accidentally hitting sandbox with production credentials and aligns
  with the P0 fix in c06339e8 that removed default URLs from DocuSign.
- Update integration tests to pass explicit base URL via
  `client_with_credentials` helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
